name: Impossible Pumpkin Pie- 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a pie plate, 10 x 1 1/2".
3. In a blender, combine all ingredients and blend on high speed until smooth, about 1 minute.
4. If the blender does not hold 5 cups, transfer the mixture to a mixing bowl and beat with a mixer on medium speed for about 2 minutes until smooth.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pie plate.
6. Bake for 50 to 55 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Serves 8.
High Altitude Directions (3500 to 6500 ft.): Bake for an additional 5 minutes.
